rulings.Case Title: CONSERVATORSHIP OF KIM SENG TANG
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Report, Fees
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 2/3/25. (No earlier availability.) Issue(s) necessitating continuance: (1) No proposed order has been lodged or received by the assigned examiner. [LRSF 14.7 A. and 14.59 E.] (2) Notice must have ATTACHED TO IT the procedures for how to make a remote appearance by Zoom and CourtCall, as well as remote public access, as set out at https://sf.courts.ca.gov/divisions/probate-court. [LRSF 14.1 C.6.] (Why did the Notice of Hearing show the petitioner's representative capacity as "Proposed Conservator of the Estate"? (3) Notice was not given to the conservatee, but was given to his former spouse, who was removed as Conservator of the Person in February. (4) Proof of payment of the assessment fee must be filed before an accounting can be approved. (5) For the first account, the conservator also must file all original account statements showing the account balance immediately preceding the date the conservator was appointed. [Prob. C. Sect. 2620(c)(2).] (6) Courtesy copies of the petition and related papers were not provided to the examiner, as required by LRSF 2.7 B and 14.7 B., so the petition and declarations, etc., have not been reviewed in detail yet, but it appears that the number of shares of the assets was not set forth either on hand or at the end of the accounting period, and the accounting schedules were not sufficiently DETAILED (date, source or payee, description, amount). Please provide a proposed order and courtesy copies of the petition and related papers and any new papers filed to address these issues to the assigned examiner by 1/20/25. Examiner continuances are final and not subject to contest under LRSF 14.10 B.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF JOAN S. JACKSON
rulings.Calendar Matter: REPORT OF STATUS OF ADMINISTRATION
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 1/29/25. (No earlier availability.) Notice must have attached to it the procedures for how to make a remote appearance by Zoom and CourtCall, as well as remote public access, as set out at https://sf.courts.ca.gov/divisions/probate-court. [LRSF 14.1 C.6.] Please provide a courtesy copy of the proof of service of the complete notice to the assigned examiner by 1/15/25. Examiner continuances are final and not subject to contest under LRSF 14.10 B. NB: If the accounting is not waived, the first two-year accounting is already overdue. [LRSF 14.34 A.] Reference to "estate tax" presumably means fiduciary income tax, as the administrator also alleges that the estate was NOT subject to estate tax (no 706).

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF LOVIE MAE PHILLIPS
rulings.Calendar Matter: REPORT OF STATUS OF ADMINISTRATION
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 01/06/2025, as the following issues (e-mailed to counsel on 09/20/2024) remain unaddressed: 1) Victor Phillips' zip code listed on the proof of service appears incorrect. 2) Each status report must include all allegations required by LRSF 14.35(J)(1), even if they were made in previously reports. 3) The decedent died more than 2 years ago, but no first interim account has been filed. Does the petitioner anticipate collecting waivers of account from both beneficiaries? See LRSF 14.34(A) & Probate Code section 10950. Note: The petition only requested a continuance of administration until 12/01/2024. The petition must be amended and renoticed if a petition for final distribution is not ready by the next hearing. An appearance may be required on 01/06/2025 for the Court to consider whether to take this petition off calendar, unless papers showing satisfactory progress to address the issues are filed (or unless a petition for final distribution is filed).

rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE NAOMI RUTH PIERCE LIVING TRUST, DTD APRIL 1, 2002
rulings.Calendar Matter: Petition To Bring Trust Under Court Supervision
rulings.Rulings: Hearing. Appearance required, despite the following issues (e-mailed to counsel on 08/14/2024) that have not been addressed since this petition was initially set for 08/27/2024: 1) A copy of the trust was not attached to the petition. 2) Please provide an itemized list of assets currently held by the trustee, including fair market value of each asset. 3) Please provide estimated annual gross income of the trust. 4) The trustee is subject to the same terms and conditions as a conservator of the estate, unless specifically waived by the Court upon a showing of good cause. See LRSF 14.47(B)(5). Other than the bond, is the trustee requesting waiver of any requirement applicable to a conservator of the estate? Please clarify the extent of court supervision sought by the petition and identify each trust provision affected by the proposed supervision. Also note: The one-page proposed order lodged on 11/26/2024 must be revised to include the language required by LRSF 14.47(B)(5) to subject the trustee to the same terms and conditions as a conservator of the estate, together with blank status hearing dates for the trustee's bond, inventory and appraisal, and first account. PARTIES APPEARING SHOULD CHECK IN FOR THE HEARING WITH THEIR FULL NAME. Counsel and parties may appear personally or remotely through Zoom or CourtCall. For a video appearance, go to zoom.us, click "join a meeting" and input meeting ID 160 225 4765 and password 514879. For an audio-only appearance through Zoom, call 1-669-254-5252 and key in meeting ID "160 225 4765#", then participant ID "0#", then password "514879#". (Toll rates may apply).) The Court prefers that counsel and parties appearing by video input their first and last name into the "Your Name" dialogue box. Counsel and parties may appear by audio-only telephone through CourtCall by calling 1-888-882-6878. Please review LRSF 14.1(C) for more information.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF TAEKO HAMANO
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 1/15/25. (No earlier availability.) Issue(s) necessitating continuance: (1) When second generation or more distant heirs are listed, the deceased ancestor through whom they take (or would have taken) shall be named and his or her date of death and relationship to the decedent shall be stated. [LRSF 14.18 C.] Who were the decedent's parents and when did they die? (2) Notice must have attached to it the procedures for how to make a remote appearance by Zoom and CourtCall, as well as remote public access, as set out at https://sf.courts.ca.gov/divisions/probate-court. [LRSF 14.1 C.6.] (3) The Confidential Statement of Birth Date and Driver's License Number (Judicial Council Form DE-147S) is also required, pursuant to Probate Code Section 8404(b). Form DE-147S must be filed separately and confidentially with a cover sheet. Please provide courtesy copies of any papers filed to address these issues to the assigned examiner by 12/31/24. Examiner continuances are final and not subject to contest under LRSF 14.10 B.

rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE 2023 JONG MOON LEE REVOCABLE TRUST, DATE AUGUST 16 TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Petition For Order Confirming Trustee And Confirming Property Owned By Trust [Probate Code 17200 Et Seq.]
rulings.Rulings: Hearing. Appearance required. The following issues to be cleared or addressed: 1. In lieu of notice of hearing (for 12/2/24), written waiver of notice (for 12/2/24) from the beneficiaries - (1) Harry Soon Lee and (2) Mark Mansoo Lee - as well as the third named successor trustee, (3) Dylan Alexander Riley. 2. Petition to set forth statutory authority under which the court can grant the request. Petition cites Prob. Code sec. 17200 only. 3. Petition prays more than confirmation of an asset (Prayer #3 and 4) while the proposed order solely prays for confirmation of the asset. The court will not likely review prayer #3 and #4). 4. Petition to set forth APN and legal description of the real property. Proposed order may need to identify the information. PARTIES APPEARING SHOULD CHECK IN FOR THE HEARING WITH THEIR FULL NAME. Counsel and parties may appear personally or remotely through Zoom or CourtCall. For a video appearance, go to zoom.us, click "join a meeting" and input meeting ID 160 225 4765 and password 514879. For an audio-only appearance through Zoom, call 1-669-254-5252 and key in meeting ID "160 225 4765#", then participant ID "0#", then password "514879#". (Toll rates may apply).) The Court prefers that counsel and parties appearing by video input their first and last name into the "Your Name" dialogue box. Counsel and parties may appear by audio-only telephone through CourtCall by calling 1-888-882-6878. Please review LRSF 14.1(C) for more information.
